name: criminal_justice_cold_chain_marrowbridge_jus_mer
premise: A jail heat emergency triggered a cell unlock protocol that conflicts with a gang-intelligence hold order. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice cold chain marrowbridge jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A court filing or contractual notice deadline expires at close of business; missing it waives a procedural defense. No option cleanly satisfies both justice and mercy; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Omar Hughes
agents.identity: I am Omar Hughes, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Morales
agents.identity: I am Talia Morales, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with mercy.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to mercy to preserve operational justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Omar Hughes must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Omar Hughes do?
